name: Copilot PoC Plugin
description: A proof-of-concept GitHub Copilot Extension that demonstrates how to build and expose a custom Copilot plugin.

pricing.notes: Available at no cost for GitHub-internal use only.

permissions.description: Required to receive and respond to Copilot chat messages.

skills.name: get_issue
skills.description: Fetches details about a specific GitHub issue, including its title, state, body, and labels.

skills.name: search_repos
skills.description: Searches GitHub for repositories matching a query and returns a summary of the top results.

skills.name: get_user
skills.description: Retrieves the public GitHub profile for a given username, including their name, bio, company, location, and public repository count.
